task: go towards the pink block and lift it
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cabinet with open doors reveals a cluttered interior. On the left, a white tray holds a red cube, a blue cube, and a yellow cube. On the right, a white tray holds a pink cube, a green cube, and a small red cube. The cabinet interior is a light gray surface. STRATEGY - First, reach into the cabinet to locate the pink block. Then, grasp it. Lift the pink block, ensuring it is clear of the cabinet interior. Transport it to a safe area outside the cabinet. Finally, place it down. Failure modes include misreaching for the pink block or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach into the cabinet to find the pink block; Step 2 grasp the pink block; Step 3 lift it clear of the cabinet; Step 4 transport it to a safe area; Step 5 place it down.
Goal: on(pink_block, safe_area); stable(pink_block)
Scene: white_cabinet, pink_block, red_cube, blue_cube, yellow_cube, green_cube, small_red_cube, white_tray_left, white_tray_right
Step 1: reach(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the pink block inside the white cabinet
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: holding(pink_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_block)
Step 3: lift(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: holding(pink_block) [progress]
  spatial: above(pink_block, cabinet_interior, 0.05) [completion]
  done_when: above(pink_block, cabinet_interior, 0.05)
Step 4: transport(pink_block -> safe_area)
  affordance_region: an empty area outside the cabinet
  spatial: above(pink_block, safe_area, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_block)
  done_when: above(pink_block, safe_area, 0.05)
Step 5: place(pink_block -> safe_area)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the safe surface
  contact: surface_contact(pink_block, safe_area) [completion]; released(pink_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_block, safe_area) AND released(pink_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the pink block inside the white cabinet
the body of the pink block
the body of the pink block
an empty area outside the cabinet
an empty area on the safe surface
